ddls:
CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "server_type" TEXT /* Type of the server (e.g., web server, database server) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the server (e.g., data center, cloud provider) */,
  "os_type" TEXT /* Operating system type */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "hostname" TEXT /* Hostname of the server */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the server (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance data point */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server the data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "cpu_user" TEXT /* CPU usage by user processes */,
  "cpu_sys" TEXT /* CPU usage by system processes */,
  "mem_total" TEXT /* Total memory available */,
  "mem_high_total" TEXT /* High total memory available */,
  "mem_low_total" TEXT /* Low total memory available */,
  "mem_swap_free" TEXT /* Swap memory available */,
  "mem_active" TEXT /* Active memory */,
  "mem_inactive" TEXT /* Inactive memory */,
  "net_eno1_write_kb" TEXT /* Network write traffic on eno1 interface */,
  "net_eno1_read_kb" TEXT /* Network read traffic on eno1 interface */,
  "disk_busy_sda" TEXT /* Disk busy time for sda device */,
  "disk_read_sda" TEXT /* Disk read operations for sda device */,
  "disk_write_sda" TEXT /* Disk write operations for sda device */,
  "disk_usage_sda" TEXT /* Disk usage percentage for sda device */,
  "load_average_1m" TEXT /* 1-minute load average */,
  "load_average_5m" TEXT /* 5-minute load average */,
  "load_average_15m" TEXT /* 15-minute load average */,
  "network_inbound" TEXT /* Network inbound traffic */,
  "network_outbound" TEXT /* Network outbound traffic */,
  "io_read" TEXT /* IO read operations */,
  "io_write" TEXT /* IO write operations */,
  "io_wait" TEXT /* IO wait time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert type */,
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* ID of the threshold */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value that triggered the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alert_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_type_id") REFERENCES alert_types ("alert_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_threshold_id FOREIGN KEY ("threshold_id") REFERENCES thresholds ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_types" (
  "alert_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert type */,
  "alert_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "alert_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert type the threshold belongs to */,
  "threshold_value" TEXT /* Value of the threshold */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the threshold value (e.g., %, MB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_alert_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_type_id") REFERENCES alert_types ("alert_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., system administrator, DevOps engineer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user creation */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, disabled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the server */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the server was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of dashboard creation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dashboard */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether this is the default dashboard for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the widget belongs to */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of the widget (e.g., chart, table) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the widget */,
  "config" TEXT /* Configuration settings for the widget (JSON format) */,
  "position_x" INTEGER /* X position of the widget on the dashboard */,
  "position_y" INTEGER /* Y position of the widget on the dashboard */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the widget */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the widget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_data_archive" (
  "archive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each archived data point */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server the data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON object containing the performance data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("archive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_archive_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)
